report.summary: Built two new learn guides: Tokenized Gold (XAUT, PAXG & gold-backed crypto beginner guide) and AMM & Liquidity Pools (intermediate guide covering constant product formula, concentrated liquidity, Uniswap V4 hooks), both with full SEO metadata, structured data, and internal linking.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Tokenized Gold: Researched the $6B+ tokenized gold market (Feb 2026). XAUT leads with $2.2B market cap (409K tokens, 12.7 metric tons in Swiss LBMA vaults), followed by PAXG at $2B (380K tokens, London LBMA vaults, NYDFS regulated). Together they control ~96-97% of the sector. Gold prices at $4,300-$4,600/oz. Emerging alternatives include Kinesis Gold (KAU, $347M, yield-bearing), VeraOne (VRO, eco-friendly), Quorium Gold (QGOLD, BNB Chain), VNXAU (Liechtenstein regulated). Geopolitical tensions and safe-haven demand driving growth. Topic is trending in March 2026 due to XAUT price action and Iran-related market volatility.

AMM & Liquidity Pools: Researched the DEX landscape in 2026. Uniswap commands ~37% DEX market share with ~70K daily active users across 12 networks. V4 (launched early 2025) introduced Singleton architecture and hooks system for custom logic (dynamic fees, TWAMMs, KYC gates, auto-compounding). Curve Finance dominates stablecoin swaps with StableSwap invariant. Raydium leads Solana with $1.4B TVL and ~$1B daily volume via hybrid AMM + order book. Balancer V3 adds weighted pools and dynamic fees. Berachain's proof-of-liquidity is a new paradigm. Impermanent loss remains the key LP risk.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Tokenized Gold Guide 2026 — ~3,000 word beginner learn guide covering what tokenized gold is, minting/redemption mechanics, XAUT vs PAXG head-to-head comparison table (9 metrics), emerging alternatives (KAU, VRO, QGOLD, VNXAU), 6 DeFi use cases, 5 risk categories with mitigation checklist, 4 acquisition methods, and 6-item FAQ section.

AMM & Liquidity Pools Guide 2026 — ~3,000 word intermediate learn guide covering constant product formula (x*y=k) with worked examples, concentrated liquidity mechanics, top 5 AMM platform comparison table (Uniswap V4, Curve, Raydium, Balancer, PancakeSwap), Uniswap V4 hooks deep dive, 6-step LP onboarding, impermanent loss explanation with numeric example, advanced AMM designs (StableSwap, weighted pools, hybrid, proof-of-liquidity), and 6-item FAQ.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Tokenized Gold: Title 'Tokenized Gold Guide 2026 — XAUT, PAXG & Gold-Backed Crypto Explained | degen0x', target keyword 'tokenized gold', OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, 6 keyword variations, FAQ schema-ready content, featured snippet-optimized opening paragraph

AMM & Liquidity Pools: Title 'AMM & Liquidity Pools Guide 2026 — How DEX Trading Works | degen0x', target keyword 'automated market maker', OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, 6 keyword variations (automated market maker, liquidity pools, AMM crypto, how DEX works, Uniswap V4, impermanent loss), FAQ schema-ready content
Both pages include 5+ internal links to existing degen0x content (tools, ecosystem pages, related guides)
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts (batch 15)
